title: innomcp Team Charter YAML — Formalize Provider Dispatch Flow
summary: Define a YAML Team Charter for innomcp's innova_bot provider selection and escalation chain. MAW Engine pattern: YAML spec → standing multi-agent team with defined 5-stage pipeline. Makes routing/escalation (CMD→Sonnet→OPUS/GPT5.5) auditable and version-controlled.
acceptance_criteria: 1. Create .innomcp/team-charter.yaml with: provider order, escalation triggers (quality thresholds), stage definitions (plan→spec→dev→qa→approve)
2. Charter drives the loop: each ticket flows through stages with defined entry/exit criteria
3. Escalation path documented: CMD writes spec → Sonnet approves → DEV implements → chamu QA → OPUS/GPT5.5 fixes if QA fails
4. Version-controlled alongside tickets — charter changes auditable via git
tasks: Task 1: Create .innomcp/team-charter.yaml with provider roles and stage definitions
Task 2: Update innomcp_dev_backlog.md to reference charter for all future tickets
Task 3: Validate charter against current 009-011 ticket flow (retroactive fit check)
